name: Exxon Mobil Corporation
description: Exxon Mobil Corporation is one of the world's largest publicly traded international energy and petrochemical companies. It operates through several segments, including Upstream, Product Solutions, and Low Carbon Solutions. The company explores for, produces, and sells crude oil and natural gas, while also manufacturing and marketing petroleum products and chemicals. ExxonMobil is increasingly investing in lower-emission technologies such as carbon capture, hydrogen, and lithium production to support the global transition toward a lower-carbon future while meeting current energy demands.
